steps.title: Add a second reason
steps.content: The passage explains why Honeoye is a fitting state soil. One reason is that it is abundant across New York; the next sentence adds another reason, its role in agriculture.

steps.title: Reject nonadditive transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals time, not another reason. Choice B signals an alternative, but both points support the same claim. Choice C signals opposition, though the second point reinforces the first. The answer is D.
